rationale: Educ. Code §28.009 governs college credit and dual credit programs for high school students. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each school district shall implement a program under which students may earn the equivalent of at least 12 semester credit hours of college credit in high school.
_note: The rule text concerns dual credit/college credit programs and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
